commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh They continue this day according to your ordinances: for all are your servants. Augustine of Hippo 91. "Day continueth according to Thy ordinance" (ver. For all these things are day: "and this is the day which the Lord hath made: let us rejoice and be glad in it:" and "let us walk honestly as in the day. " "For all things serve Thee. " He said all things of some: "all" which belong to this day "serve Thee. " For the ungodly of whom it is said, "I have compared thy mother unto the night," do not serve Thee.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Serve thee. Except man, (Worthington) and angels who rebel; and yet they also are forced to serve as victims of justice, if they have refused to accept of mercy. (Haydock)
